name: Sarah Chen
title: ML Engineer at DataCo
bio: 5 years building production ML systems. Contributor to LangChain. Runs a popular blog on practical RAG patterns.

name: Marcus Johnson
title: Senior Developer Advocate at CloudAI
bio: Former backend engineer turned DevRel. Specializes in making AI concepts accessible. Great with beginner audiences.

name: Priya Patel
title: AI Research Scientist
bio: PhD in NLP. Published papers on efficient fine-tuning methods. Prefers deep technical content over introductory material.

name: Alex Rivera
title: Freelance AI Consultant
bio: Helps startups deploy AI without burning through runway. Practical, no-nonsense approach. Great war stories.

name: Jordan Kim
title: Open Source Maintainer — LocalAI
bio: Passionate about democratizing AI. Maintains LocalAI project. Can demo running models on a laptop live.

name: Elena Vasquez
title: Product Manager at ToolChain AI
bio: Bridges the gap between AI capabilities and user needs. Gives talks that make engineers think about the people using their tools.

name: David Okafor
title: Security Engineer at SafeAI
bio: Red teams AI systems for a living. Makes security topics engaging and practical. Always has a live demo that terrifies the audience.

name: Lisa Wong
title: CTO at MiniStartup
bio: Built her startup's entire AI stack with a 3-person team. Knows what works at small scale. First-time speaker but very knowledgeable.
